summary: See clues file for full details. 6 tossups, 8 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 6 tossups and 8 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: Months before dying, this artist burned asbestos-covered cardboard with a blowtorch to make "fire paintings." Arman filled the Iris Clert Gallery with trash in response to an exhibition by this artist that only displayed an empty glass cabinet.
examples: Months before dying, this artist burned asbestos-covered cardboard with a blowtorch to make "fire paintings." Arman filled the Iris Clert Gallery with trash in response to an exhibition by this artist that only displayed an empty glass cabinet.

clues.clue: In one project, this artist sold certificates of ownership of non-existent spaces for gold, then threw half of the gold into a river.
examples: In one project, this artist sold certificates of ownership of non-existent spaces for gold, then threw half of the gold into a river.

clues.clue: Pierre Restany collaborated with this artist to found (*) New Realism.
examples: Pierre Restany collaborated with this artist to found (*) New Realism.

clues.clue: A material developed by this artist was approximated for an experimental 1993 film on the AIDS crisis by Derek Jarman.
examples: A material developed by this artist was approximated for an experimental 1993 film on the AIDS crisis by Derek Jarman.

clues.clue: This artist had nude models cover themselves with paint and roll on canvases to create his Anthropometries.
examples: This artist had nude models cover themselves with paint and roll on canvases to create his Anthropometries.

clues.clue: A director with this surname made a film in which a white nationalist superhero teams up with a sidekick played by Delphine Seyrig  to fight communists.
examples: A director with this surname made a film in which a white nationalist superhero teams up with a sidekick played by Delphine Seyrig  to fight communists.

clues.clue: In a film by Joseph Losey, Alain Delon  plays an art dealer with this last name who is mistaken for a Jewish man with the same name during the Holocaust.
examples: In a film by Joseph Losey, Alain Delon  plays an art dealer with this last name who is mistaken for a Jewish man with the same name during the Holocaust.

clues.clue: Freedom were directed by William, a photographer and director with this last name.
examples: Freedom were directed by William, a photographer and director with this last name.

clues.clue: An artist with this surname had a heart attack the night that he watched (*) Mondo Cane , which features a recreation of one of his "anthropometries"  performances.
examples: An artist with this surname had a heart attack the night that he watched (*) Mondo Cane , which features a recreation of one of his "anthropometries"  performances.

clues.clue: That artist with this surname inspired the visuals of a 1993 film about the director's experience living with AIDS.
examples: That artist with this surname inspired the visuals of a 1993 film about the director's experience living with AIDS.

clues.clue: Note to players: I apologize in advance.
examples: Note to players: I apologize in advance.
